spec_match.rationale: Flawless spec mapping. Explains progress(value from start to end) and applies it natively in width and scale calc expressions.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive. Offers sliders for value, range start, and range end, updating the CSS variable tree and a computed Javascript fallback readout simultaneously.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligns perfectly with the core CSS progress() math function feature description.

edge_cases.rationale: Includes a solid feature detection badge using CSS.supports() with a fallback warning when the browser lacks progress() support.

references.rationale: Includes the mandatory Spec and ChromeStatus entry reference links.

design_system.rationale: Uses standard design tokens and CSS variables seamlessly.

summary: A flawless demonstration of CSS progress() math function. It features interactive sliders to manipulate custom properties, displays a robust browser support status badge, provides clear source snippets, and links to appropriate spec reference documentation.
